hints.overview: Base64 encode/decode operating on Uint8Array. Use for binary data from APIs.
criticalRules: decode() returns Uint8Array, not a string — convert with bytesToStr if needed
encode() takes Uint8Array, not a string — convert with strToBytes if needed
commonPatterns: Decode API response: const bytes = decode(base64String)
Encode for embedding: const b64 = encode(someBytes)
